content.en:
Ye Tian first copied the body of a realm realm legendary lord in the True Void Holy Land, and immediately walked towards the cyan palace.

Whether you can get in or not depends on this time.

If you can get in, it means that the ability of the Legendary Realm Lord can't see through the copying ability of the copying talent, and if you can't get in, it means that the ability to copy the talent is not so awesome.

Wow!

Ye Tian's body entered the cyan palace and was not restricted.

"If I can really go in, then all the treasures of this palace belong to me. "

Immediately.

Ye Tian casually chose three treasures, and then immediately came out.

Then, Ye Tian annihilated this copy body and began to copy the body of another Spirit Realm Legendary Lord

In this way, Ye Tian entered the cyan palace again and again as different legendary lords.

Not long after, almost a thousand kinds of treasures in the cyan palace fell into Ye Tian's hands.

It can be said that with the value of these treasures, his current value is enough to be comparable to that of an ordinary Legendary Realm Lord.

All the treasures are in hand, there is no need for Ye Tian to stay here.

In an instant, Ye Tian left here directly, passed the time trap, and returned to the periphery.

On the way back, he ran into other Legendary Lords, but he didn't care.

After all, there had already been a legendary lord who had seen him pass through the time trap before, and the news that he had passed through the time trap couldn't be concealed at all.

However, when it comes to the treasure in his hand, he will not return.

At the moment, the other Legendary Lords just don't know how many treasures there are in the cyan palace, but they will definitely know that the Time River Bead is in his hands.

However, after all, he is a member of the True Void Holy Land, and if a replica body stays in the True Void Holy Land, he is not afraid of being intercepted and killed.

Soon.

Ye Tian rushed out of the Yang Lie Lord's graveyard and then returned to the True Void Holy Land as fast as he could.

......

There is really no holy land, Ye Tian is back.

After that, he didn't care.

After coming back, he began to refine the Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit as soon as possible, there was no need to keep this treasure, and he directly refined it to improve his will.

His willpower was also very close to the peak of the fifth order, and if he directly refined the Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit, he could break through to the sixth order of eternal will one hundred percent.

Immediately.

Ye Tian took out the Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit and swallowed it in one gulp.

Rumble!

The energy of the Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit exploded in Ye Tian's body, fused into the body particles, and began to enhance Ye Tian's will, especially the Will Source Sea, which began to transform.

Soon, Ye Tian's will was raised to the peak of the fifth order.

A certain moment.

Click!

The shackles were broken, and Ye Tian's will was raised to the sixth order of eternal will.

Airplanes!!

The terrifying will power diffused from Ye Tian's body.

At this time, all the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Holy Land sensed it, because Ye Tian had just broken through and couldn't completely conceal his will power, so they sensed a trace of it

"The will of the Endless Lord has actually reached the sixth order, he hasn't broken through to the Transcendent Realm Lord yet, this will power has increased too quickly. "

One Legendary Realm Lord after another was surprised.

After a period of time, Ye Tian completely refined the energy of the Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit, and his willpower steadily reached the sixth order

Then.

The incarnation of the Frostless Lord descended and came to Ye Tian's face.

"I've seen the Frostless Lord!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Endless Lord, I saw that you were only less than the peak will of the fifth order before, and you suddenly reached the sixth order of the will. @无霜领主表示很好奇.

"I'm lucky, I got a Forbidden Heaven Sea Fruit!"

Ye Tian said.

"Obtained from the Sun Flame Lord's graveyard?"

The Frostless Lord guessed it.

The news of the Yang Lie Lord's Cemetery has now spread, so she also knows that Ye Tian has entered the Yang Lie Lord's Cemetery, but he has come back early, and he must have a big harvest.

A forbidden heaven sea fruit, this is indeed a very amazing harvest.

"You've found the time river bead, otherwise with your temperament, you will never come back. "

The Frostless Lord said with a smile.

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian admitted.

The Frostless Lord is a Legendary Realm Lord, so he won't covet his Time River Bead, so there's no need to hide anything.

However, he did not reveal that he had robbed all the treasures inside the cemetery, otherwise it would be difficult to explain.

The Frostless Lord didn't ask much, but came to reveal a message: "Endless Lord, your will has reached the sixth order, and your strength should be improved a lot, you can prepare for it.In the near future, there may be hope to obtain Kuhai Gravel, of course, it is only possible, whether you can obtain it or not depends on your strength0........

"Please also ask the Lord of Frostless to reveal a thing or two. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

"I can't disclose it at the moment, but you can't get the news out there, and you'll know when the time comes. "

With that, the Frostless Lord left.

"What's the news?"

Ye Tian was extremely curious, and felt that the True Saintless Land should have a big move, otherwise it would not be so secretive.

Moreover, Lord Frost said that he had a chance to obtain Kukai Gravel, which might have something to do with the Strange Star Tower.

Of course, he didn't speculate much, and he wouldn't say it.

"No matter what happens, strength is the most important thing, and you have to try to improve your strength during this time. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he took out the Median Eternal Treasure Ruyi Void Tissot.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tiancai refined the Ruyi Void Tissot.

Not only does the Ruyi Void Tissot contain a variety of eternal paths, but it also has several great functions.

First, it can allow Ye Tian to travel long distances, such as the Infinite Sea and the Source Sea, if he flies, it will take a long time, and only through the time and space ladder can he quickly return to the Source Sea.

And after mastering the Ruyi Void Tissot, he can reach the source sea after a few shuttles.

It can be said that in the future, he will be second only to the Lord of the Legendary Realm in the future.

Second, it can break through the space to suppress 0.9.For example, if you control the half-step legendary realm of space, if you attack him, he can escape with the help of Ruyi Void Tiansuo, if not, it is like Void Tianshuo.

A half-step legendary realm who has mastered the space can kill him with a single thought.

Three, escape into the empty sea, and can survive in the empty sea for a while.

That's awesome!

It is difficult for the half-step Legendary Realm Lord to enter the Long River of Time and the Sky Sea, but he can escape into the Sky Sea with the help of the Ruyi Void Tissot, which is enough to prove the strength of the Ruyi Void Tissot.

Moreover, escaping into the empty sea is also a way to avoid the pursuit of the enemy.

However, for the Lord of the Legendary Realm, it is of little use to the Wishful Void Tissot.

But for Ye Tian, who was not yet the lord of the transcendent realm, the wishful void Tiansuo could greatly enhance his ability to save his life. _
